title: MuniCenter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''MuniCenter''' was a building in [[Plawal Rift]] on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]], erected after the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] left. It contained the [[MuniCenter Records Office]].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]
